title: oenothera cardiophylla subsp. cedrosensis
intro: Oenothera cardiophylla subsp. cedrosensis, also known as Cedros Island evening primrose, is a rare and endangered subspecies of flowering plant in the family Onagraceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oenothera cardiophylla subsp. cedrosensis include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin conditions, as well as its possible anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential medicinal uses.
